description_long: This object is a modern mobile phone with a rectangular, slightly tapered body and a large touchscreen display dominating the front. The screen shows a typical Android interface with app icons such as Calculator, Clock, Contacts, Snapchat, Uber, and Spotify, as well as a Google search bar at the top. The phone's body appears to be a dark green or teal color, with a matte or semi-gloss finish. Physical buttons are visible on the side, likely for power and volume control, and there are small circular features on the front, possibly for the front camera and sensors. No visible branding or logo is present on the exterior. The phone is slim and compact, designed for handheld use.
description: A slim, dark green mobile phone with a large touchscreen displaying an Android interface and side buttons for control.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the slim profile and two side buttons.
description_view_1: A rear or back view showing the solid dark green surface with no visible branding or camera.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, showing a slim edge with two small circular features, possibly ports or microphone holes.
description_view_3: The front view displaying the touchscreen with app icons, a Google search bar, and small circular features above and below the screen.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays an Android home interface with a Google search bar at the top, app icons including Calculator, Clock, Contacts, Downloads, Gallery, Settings, Snapchat, Uber, NPR One, Alto, Twitter, Facebook, Spotify, and WhatsApp, and a white background.
attribute_camera_placement: One small circular feature above the screen, likely a front-facing camera, with no visible rear camera.
attribute_button_layout: Two physical buttons on the left edge, likely for power and volume control, rectangular in shape.
